title: Visualizing Operations on the Independent Variable
summary: This page covers MATLAB's short-circuit logical operators (&& and ||) and demonstrates how to visualize shifting and scaling operations on a function's independent variable using anonymous functions. It shows how to plot g(2t+1) where g(t) is a causal exponentially decaying cosine, illustrating time compression and left shifting. A figure confirms the expected waveform behavior, including the turn-on point at t = -0.5.

figures.caption: Plot of g(2t+1) over the interval −2 ≤ t ≤ 2, showing the time-scaled and time-shifted version of g(t).
